zh.West Horndon, Essex, England: 英國艾可韋斯特 霍登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth FitzLewis於1436年出生在英國艾可韋斯特 霍登時，她的父親Sir John FitzLewis61歲，母親Anne Montague53歲。她於1450年與Sir John Wingfield在英國素福爾可列黑林加姆結婚。他們至少是12個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她在英國英格蘭賀福爾被列為sheriff of essex and。她去世於1500年12月22日在英國素福爾可列黑林加姆享年64歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可列黑林加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth FitzLewis于1436年出生在英国艾可韋斯特 霍登时，她的父亲Sir John FitzLewis61岁，母亲Anne Montague53岁。她于1450年与Sir John Wingfield在英国素福爾可列黑林加姆结婚。他们至少是12个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她在英国英格兰賀福爾被列为sheriff of essex and。她去世于1500年12月22日在英国素福爾可列黑林加姆享年64岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可列黑林加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth FitzLewis was born in 1436, in West Horndon, Essex, England, her father, Sir John FitzLewis, was 61 and her mother, Anne Montague, was 53. She married Sir John Wingfield in 1450, in Letheringham, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 12 sons and 3 daughters. Her occupation is listed as sheriff of essex and in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. She died on 22 December 1500, in Letheringham, Suffolk, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Letheringham, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth FitzLewis est née en 1436, à West Horndon, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir John FitzLewis, avait 61 ans et sa mère, Anne Montague, avait 53 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Wingfield en 1450, à Letheringham, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 12 fils et 3 filles. La profession de sa indiquée est sheriff of essex and à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée le 22 décembre 1500, à Letheringham, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Letheringham, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.West Horndon, Essex, England, United Kin: West Horndon, Essex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth FitzLewis 1436 in West Horndon, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John FitzLewis 61 und ihre Mutter Anne Montague 53. Sie hat 1450 in Letheringham, Suffolk, England Sir John Wingfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 12 Söhne und 3 Töchter. ihr Beruf ist als sheriff of essex and in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Sie starb am 22. Dezember 1500 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Letheringham, Suffolk, England und wurde in Letheringham, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth FitzLewis è nata il nel 1436 nel West Horndon, Essex, England, sua padre, Sir John FitzLewis, aveva 61 anni e sua madre, Anne Montague, aveva 53 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Wingfield nel 1450, nel Letheringham, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 12 figli e 3 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of essex and nel Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 22 dicembre 1500, nel Letheringham, Suffolk, England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Letheringham, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth FitzLewisが1436年にイギリスエセックスウエスト ホールンドンで生まれた時，父Sir John FitzLewisは61歳，母Anne Montagueは53歳であった。1450年にイギリススフォルクレスエリンガムでSir John Wingfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも12人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでの職業はsheriff of essex andと記録されている。彼女は1500年12月22日にイギリススフォルクレスエリンガムで64歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクレスエリンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth FitzLewis(이)가 1436년 영국 에세스 웨스트 호른던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John FitzLewis(은)는 61세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Montague(은)는 53세였다. 그녀는 1450년 영국 수폴크 레더잉함에서 Sir John Wingfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 sheriff of essex and이었다. 그녀는 1500년 12월 22일 영국 수폴크 레더잉함에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 레더잉함에 묻혔다.

pt.West Horndon, Essex, England, United Kin: West Horndon, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth FitzLewis nasceu em 1436, em West Horndon, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John FitzLewis, tinha 61 anos e sua mãe, Anne Montague, tinha 53 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Wingfield em 1450, em Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 12 filhos e 3 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como sheriff of essex and em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em 22 de dezembro de 1500, em Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ro.West Horndon, Essex, England, United Kin: West Horndon, Essex, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth FitzLewis родилась в 1436 г. в местности вест хаурндон, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John FitzLewis было 61 год, а матери, которую звали Anne Montague, 53. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Wingfield в 1450 г. в местности летирингхам, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 12 сыновей и 3 дочери.  Она работала по профессии sheriff of essex and в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла 22 декабря 1500 г. в местности летирингхам, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности летирингхам, суффолк, Англия.

es.West Horndon, Essex, England, United Kin: West Horndon, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth FitzLewis nació en 1436, en West Horndon, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John FitzLewis, tenía 61 años y su mamá, Anne Montague, tenía 53 años. Se casó con Sir John Wingfield en 1450, en Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 12 hijos y 3 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era sheriff of essex and en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 22 de diciembre de 1500, en Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
